description: Home automation software with Matter and Thread support optimized for hAP be Media
name: HA-otbr-matter
yaml:
name: HA-otbr-matter
descr: Home automation software with Matter and Thread support optimized for hAP be Media
page: https://home-assistant.io
category: home-automation
icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/explore/refs/heads/main/topics/home-assistant/home-assistant.png
services:
  otbr:
    image: docker.io/openthread/otbr
    entrypoint: /bin/bash
    command: >
      -c "rm -f /var/run/otbr-agent.pid /var/run/dbus/* &&
      exec /app/etc/docker/test/docker_entrypoint.sh"
    environment:
      - FIREWALL=0
      - RADIO_URL=spinel+hdlc+uart:///dev/ttyACM0
      - BACKBONE_INTERFACE=[containerInterface]
      - TUN_INTERFACE_NAME=wpan0
      - NAT64=1
      - HTTP_HOST=0.0.0.0
    devices:
      - /dev/ttyACM0:/dev/ttyACM0
    volumes:
      - otbr-data:/var/lib/thread
    ports:
      - 8081:8081:rest
  matter-server:
    image: ghcr.io/home-assistant-libs/python-matter-server:stable
    volumes:
      - matter-data:/data
    command: >
      --storage-path /data
      --paa-root-cert-dir /data/credentials
      --primary-interface [containerInterface]
  home-assistant:
    image: docker.io/homeassistant/home-assistant
    depends_on:
      - matter-server
      - otbr
    ports:
      - '8123:8123:web'
    volumes:
      - config:/config
    configs:
      - source: 'config_entries'
        target: '/tmp/core.config_entries_new'
      - source: 'thread_datasets'
        target: '/tmp/thread.datasets_new'
      - source: 'configuration'
        target: '/tmp/configuration_new.yaml'
    command: >
      sh -c "
        mkdir -p /config/.storage &&
        cp -n /tmp/core.config_entries_new /config/.storage/core.config_entries &&
        cp -n /tmp/thread.datasets_new /config/.storage/thread.datasets &&
        cp -n /tmp/configuration_new.yaml /config/configuration.yaml &&
        if [ ! -f /config/.otbr_initialized ]; then
          (sleep 40 && curl --max-time 10 --fail -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"channel\":25}' http://otbr:8081/node/dataset/active && sleep 5 && curl --max-time 10 --fail -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '\"enable\"' http://otbr:8081/node/state && touch /config/.otbr_initialized) &
        fi &&
        exec python -m homeassistant --config /config
      "

container-command-lines: backend:none:ghcr.io/seanmorley15/adventurelog-backend:latest,frontend:none:ghcr.io/seanmorley15/adventurelog-frontend:latest,postgres:none:docker.io/postgres:16:bash -c " apt-get update && apt-get install -y postgresql-16-postgis-3 && docker-entrypoint.sh postgres "
description: AdventureLog is a travel blog and photo journal web application
name: adventurelog
yaml:
name: adventurelog
descr: AdventureLog is a travel blog and photo journal web application
page: https://adventurelog.app
category: productivity
default-credentials: admin:admin
services:
  postgres:
    image: docker.io/postgres:16
    command: >
      bash -c "
      apt-get update &&
      apt-get install -y postgresql-16-postgis-3 &&
      docker-entrypoint.sh postgres
      "
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: database
      POSTGRES_USER: adventure
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: changeme123
    volumes:
      - adventurelog/postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    shm_size: "256mb"
    restart: unless-stopped
  backend:
    image: ghcr.io/seanmorley15/adventurelog-backend:latest
    ports:
      - 8016:80:api
    environment:
      PGHOST: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: database
      POSTGRES_USER: adventure
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: changeme123
      SECRET_KEY: changeme123
      DJANGO_ADMIN_USERNAME: admin
      DJANGO_ADMIN_PASSWORD: admin
      DJANGO_ADMIN_EMAIL: admin@example.com
      PUBLIC_URL: http://[accessIP]:8016
      CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS: http://[accessIP]:8016,http://[accessIP]:8015,http://backend:80,http://frontend:3000
      DEBUG: "True"
      FRONTEND_URL: http://frontend:3000
    volumes:
      - adventurelog/media:/code/media
    restart: unless-stopped
  frontend:
    image: ghcr.io/seanmorley15/adventurelog-frontend:latest
    ports:
      - 8015:3000:web
    environment:
      PUBLIC_SERVER_URL: http://backend:80
      ORIGIN: http://[accessIP]:8015
      BODY_SIZE_LIMIT: Infinity
    restart: unless-stopped

init_metadata:#!/bin/bash
if [ ! -f /app/calibre-web/metadata.db ]; then
  echo "[init-metadata] Downloading metadata.db..."
  curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/janeczku/calibre-web/master/library/metadata.db -o /app/calibre-web/metadata.db

        chmod 664 /app/calibre-web/metadata.db

        echo "[init-metadata] metadata.db already exists"
      fi

description: turn almost any device into a file server with resumable uploads/downloads using any web browser
name: copyparty
yaml:
name: copyparty
descr: turn almost any device into a file server with resumable uploads/downloads using any web browser
page: https://github.com/9001/copyparty
category: file-management
default-credentials: admin:securepassword
services:
  copyparty:
    image: docker.io/copyparty/ac:latest
    ports:
      - 3923:3923:web
    volumes:
      - media:/media
    environment:
      LD_PRELOAD: /usr/lib/libmimalloc-secure.so.NOPE
      # enable mimalloc by replacing "NOPE" with "2" for a nice speed-boost (will use twice as much ram)

      PYTHONUNBUFFERED: 1
      # ensures log-messages are not delayed (but can reduce speed a tiny bit)

    configs:
      - source: 'initcfg'
        target: 'z/initcfg'
    stop_grace_period: 15s  # thumbnailer is allowed to continue finishing up for 10s after the shutdown signal
configs:
  'initcfg':
    content: |
      [/media]
        /media
        accs:

console:

    client-secret: "console"
container-command-lines:
postgres:none:docker.io/postgres:14,redis:none:docker.io/redis:7:redis-server --appendonly yes,stack:none:docker.io/thethingsnetwork/lorawan-stack:latest:-c "
  if [ ! -f /config/.is-db_initialized ]; then
    # is-db setup
    while true; do
      stack is-db migrate
      ret=$?
      if [ $ret -eq 0 ]; then
        break
      else
        sleep 5
      fi
    done

    ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(cat /run/secrets/lorawan-stack__admin_password)

    stack is-db create-admin-user --id admin --email admin@localhost --password $ADMIN_PASSWORD
    stack is-db create-oauth-client --id cli --name 'Command Line Interface' --owner admin --no-secret --redirect-uri 'local-callback' --redirect-uri 'code'
    stack is-db create-oauth-client \\
      --id 'console' \\
      --name 'Console' \\
      --owner 'admin' \\
      --secret 'console' \\
      --redirect-uri 'http://stack:1885/console/oauth/callback' \\
      --redirect-uri '/console/oauth/callback' \\
      --logout-redirect-uri 'http://stack:1885/console' \\
      --logout-redirect-uri '/console'

  fi
  exec ttn-lw-stack -c '/config/ttn-lw-stack-docker.yml' start
"
description: an open source LoRaWAN network stack suitable for large, global and geo-distributed public and private networks as well as smaller networks
name: lorawan-stack
yaml:
name: lorawan-stack
page: https://hub.docker.com/r/thethingsnetwork/lorawan-stack/
descr: an open source LoRaWAN network stack suitable for large, global and geo-distributed public and private networks as well as smaller networks
default-credentials: admin:[lorawan-stack__admin_password]
category: networking
services:
  postgres:
    image: docker.io/postgres:14
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=root
      - POSTGRES_USER=root
      - POSTGRES_DB=ttn_lorawan
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  redis:
    image: docker.io/redis:7
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - redis-data:/data

  stack:
    image: docker.io/thethingsnetwork/lorawan-stack:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - redis
      - postgres
    volumes:
      - blob:/srv/ttn-lorawan/public/blob
      - data:/srv/data
      - secrets:/srv/secrets
    configs:
      - source: 'ttn-lw-stack-docker.yml'
        target: 'config/ttn-lw-stack-docker.yml'
    secrets:
      - lorawan-stack__admin_password
    environment:
      # TTN_LW_IS_ADMIN_RIGHTS_ALL: true
      # TTN_LW_IS_EMAIL_DIR: .dev/email
      TTN_LW_IS_EMAIL_PROVIDER: dir
      TTN_LW_LOG_LEVEL: debug
      TTN_LW_PLUGINS_SOURCE: directory
      TTN_LW_IS_DATABASE_URI: postgres://root:root@postgres:5432/ttn_lorawan?sslmode=disable
      TTN_LW_IS_OAUTH_UI_CANONICAL_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/oauth"
      TTN_LW_IS_OAUTH_UI_IS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_OAUTH_AUTHORIZE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/oauth/authorize"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_OAUTH_LOGOUT_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/oauth/logout"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/oauth/token"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_CANONICAL_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/console"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_IS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_GS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_NS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_AS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_JS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_EDTC_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_QRG_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_GCS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_DCS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_IS_BASE_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/api/v3"
      TTN_LW_CONSOLE_UI_ACCOUNT_URL: "[accessProto]://[accessIP]:[accessPort]/oauth"
    ports:
      # If deploying on a public server:
      - "1881:1881:gateway-server-mqtt-v2"
      - "8881:8881:gateway-server-mqtt-v2-tls"
      - "1882:1882:gateway-server-mqtt"
      - "8882:8882:gateway-server-mqtt-tls"
      - "1883:1883:app-server-mqtt"
      - "8883:8883:app-server-mqtt-tls"
      - "1884:1884:grpc"
      - "8884:8884:grpc-tls"
      - "1885:1885:web"
      - "8885:8885:web-tls"
      - "1886:1886:interop"
      - "8886:8886:interop-tls"
      - "1887:1887:web-sockets"
      - "8887:8887:web-sockets-tls"
      - "8889:8889:web-sockets"
      - "1700:1700/udp"
    entrypoint: /bin/sh
    command: >
      -c "
        if [ ! -f /config/.is-db_initialized ]; then
          # is-db setup
          while true; do
            stack is-db migrate
            ret=$?
            if [ $ret -eq 0 ]; then
              break
            else
              sleep 5
            fi
          done

          ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(cat /run/secrets/lorawan-stack__admin_password)

          stack is-db create-admin-user --id admin --email admin@localhost --password $ADMIN_PASSWORD
          stack is-db create-oauth-client --id cli --name 'Command Line Interface' --owner admin --no-secret --redirect-uri 'local-callback' --redirect-uri 'code'
          stack is-db create-oauth-client \\
            --id 'console' \\
            --name 'Console' \\
            --owner 'admin' \\
            --secret 'console' \\
            --redirect-uri 'http://stack:1885/console/oauth/callback' \\
            --redirect-uri '/console/oauth/callback' \\
            --logout-redirect-uri 'http://stack:1885/console' \\
            --logout-redirect-uri '/console'

          unset ADMIN_PASSWORD
          touch /config/.is-db_initialized
        fi
        exec ttn-lw-stack -c '/config/ttn-lw-stack-docker.yml' start
      "
configs:
  'ttn-lw-stack-docker.yml':
    content: |
      tls:
        source: acme
        acme:
          enabled: false
          dir: /var/lib/acme
          email: "you@localhost"
          hosts: ["localhost"]
          default-host: "localhost"
      console:
        ui:
          account-url: "/oauth"
          canonical-url: "/console"
          noc-url: "/noc"
        oauth:
          authorize-url: "/oauth/authorize"
          token-url: "/oauth/token"
          logout-url: "/oauth/logout"
          client-id: "console"
          client-secret: "console"

name: onlyoffice-docs
yaml:
name: onlyoffice-docs
descr: "ONLYOFFICE Document Server is an online office suite comprising viewers and editors for texts, spreadsheets and presentations, fully compatible with Office Open XML formats: .docx, .xlsx, .pptx and enabling collaborative editing in real time."
page: https://github.com/ONLYOFFICE/Docker-DocumentServer
category: productivity
services:
  documentserver:
    build:
      context: .
    image: docker.io/onlyoffice/documentserver #[-de,-ee]
    container_name: documentserver
    depends_on:
      - postgresql
      - rabbitmq
    environment:
      - DB_TYPE=postgres
      - DB_HOST=postgresql
      - DB_PORT=5432
      - DB_NAME=onlyoffice
      - DB_USER=onlyoffice
      - AMQP_URI=amqp://guest:guest@rabbitmq
      # Uncomment strings below to enable the JSON Web Token validation.
      #- JWT_ENABLED=true
      - JWT_SECRET=my_jwt_secret
      #- JWT_HEADER=Authorization
      #- JWT_IN_BODY=true
    ports:
      - '8101:80'
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8000/info/info.json"]
      interval: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
      timeout: 10s
    stdin_open: true
    restart: always
    stop_grace_period: 60s
    volumes:
       - /var/www/onlyoffice/Data
       - /var/log/onlyoffice
       - /var/lib/onlyoffice/documentserver/App_Data/cache/files
       - /var/www/onlyoffice/documentserver-example/public/files
       - /usr/share/fonts
  rabbitmq:
    container_name: rabbitmq
    image: docker.io/rabbitmq:3
    restart: always
    expose:
      - '5672'
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "status"]
      interval: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
      timeout: 10s

  postgresql:
    container_name: postgresql
    image: docker.io/postgres:15
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=onlyoffice
      - POSTGRES_USER=onlyoffice
      - POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD=trust
    restart: always
    expose:
      - '5432'
    volumes:
      - postgresql_data:/var/lib/postgresql
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U onlyoffice"]
      interval: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
      timeout: 10s

volumes:
  postgresql_data:

description: pmacct based netflow collector with db and sample grafana dashboard visualization
name: pmacct-netflow
yaml:
name: pmacct-netflow
descr: pmacct based netflow collector with db and sample grafana dashboard visualization
page: https://pmacct.net
category: networking
option: true
default-credentials: admin:admin
services:
  nfacctd:
    image: docker.io/pmacct/nfacctd:bleeding-edge
    ports:
      - 2055:2055/udp:netflow
    configs:
      - source: 'nfacctd.conf'
        target: '/etc/pmacct/nfacctd.conf'
      - source: 'schema.pgsql'
        target: '/etc/pmacct/schema.pgsql'
    stop_grace_period: 0
  nfdb:
    image: docker.io/postgres
    volumes:
      - db_data:/var/lib/postgresql
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=pmacct
      - POSTGRES_USER=pmacct
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=arealsmartpwd
    shm_size: "256mb"
  grafana:
    image: docker.io/grafana/grafana:12.3
    ports:
      - 3009:3000:web
    environment:
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD: admin
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER: admin
    configs:
      - source: 'grafana-datasources.yml'
        target: '/etc/grafana/provisioning/datasources/datasources.yml'
      - source: 'grafana-dashboards.yml'
        target: '/etc/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/dashboards.yml'
      - source: 'grafana-netflow-dashboard.json'
        target: '/etc/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/default/netflow-dashboard.json'
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
configs:
  'nfacctd.conf':
    content: |
      !
      ! General configs
      !
      ! debug: true
      daemonize: false
      !
      ! NetFlow/IPFIX daemon configs
      !
      nfacctd_port: 2055
      nfacctd_time_new: true
      !
      ! Plugins definitions
      !
      plugins: pgsql
      !
      ! Database connection definitions
      !
      sql_host: nfdb
      sql_db: pmacct
      sql_user: pmacct
      sql_passwd: arealsmartpwd
      !
      ! Plugin configuration
      !
      aggregate: tag,class,src_mac,dst_mac,vlan,src_as,dst_as,src_host,dst_host,src_port,dst_port,tcpflags,proto,tos,flows
      sql_table_version: 9
      sql_refresh_time: 60
      sql_history: 1m
      sql_history_roundoff: mh
      sql_table: acct_v9_%m%Y
      sql_table_schema: /etc/pmacct/schema.pgsql
  'schema.pgsql':
    content: |
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS acct_v9_%m%Y (
          tag BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          class_id CHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT ' ',
          mac_src macaddr NOT NULL DEFAULT '0:0:0:0:0:0',
          mac_dst macaddr NOT NULL DEFAULT '0:0:0:0:0:0',
          vlan INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          as_src BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          as_dst BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          ip_src inet NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0.0.0',
          ip_dst inet NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0.0.0',
          port_src INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          port_dst INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          tcp_flags SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          ip_proto SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          tos INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          packets INT NOT NULL,
          bytes BIGINT NOT NULL,
          flows INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          stamp_inserted timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT '0001-01-01 00:00:00',
          stamp_updated timestamp without time zone,
          PRIMARY KEY (tag, class_id, mac_src, mac_dst, vlan, as_src, as_dst, ip_src, ip_dst, port_src, port_dst, ip_proto, tos, stamp_inserted)
      );
      
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS proto (
          num SMALLINT NOT NULL,
          description CHAR(20),
          PRIMARY KEY (num)
      );
      
      INSERT INTO proto (num, description) VALUES
      (0, 'ip'), (1, 'icmp'), (2, 'igmp'), (3, 'ggp'), (4, 'ipencap'), (5, 'st'),
      (6, 'tcp'), (8, 'egp'), (9, 'igp'), (17, 'udp'), (18, 'mux'), (27, 'rdp'),
      (29, 'iso-tp4'), (30, 'netblt'), (37, 'ddp'), (39, 'idpr-cmtp'), (41, 'ipv6'),
      (43, 'ipv6-route'), (44, 'ipv6-frag'), (46, 'rsvp'), (47, 'gre'), (50, 'ipv6-crypt'),
      (51, 'ipv6-auth'), (55, 'mobile'), (56, 'tlsp'), (58, 'ipv6-icmp'), (59, 'ipv6-nonxt'),
      (60, 'ipv6-opts'), (80, 'iso-ip'), (83, 'vines'), (88, 'eigrp'), (89, 'ospf'),
      (90, 'sprite-rpc'), (93, 'ax-25'), (94, 'ipip'), (98, 'encap'), (102, 'pnni'),
      (108, 'IPcomp'), (111, 'ipx-in-ip'), (112, 'vrrp'), (115, 'l2tp'), (124, 'isis'),
      (132, 'sctp'), (133, 'fc')
      ON CONFLICT (num) DO NOTHING;
      
      GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON acct_v9_%m%Y TO pmacct;
      GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON proto TO pmacct;
  'grafana-datasources.yml':
    content: |
      apiVersion: 1
      datasources:
        - name: postgres-netflow
          type: grafana-postgresql-datasource
          access: proxy
          orgId: 1
          url: nfdb
          database: pmacct
          user: pmacct
          secureJsonData:
            password: "arealsmartpwd"
          jsonData:
            sslmode: "disable"
            timescaledb: false
  'grafana-dashboards.yml':
    content: |
      - name: 'default'
        org_id: 1
        folder: ''
        type: file
        options:
          folder: '/etc/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/default'
  'grafana-netflow-dashboard.json':
    content: |

        },
        "editable": true,

description: Web-based IMAP email client with modern interface
name: roundcube
yaml:
name: roundcube
descr: Web-based IMAP email client with modern interface
page: https://roundcube.net
category: communication
default-credentials: use email account credentials
services:
  roundcubedb:
    image: docker.io/library/postgres:17
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=roundcube
      - POSTGRES_USER=roundcube
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=changeme
    volumes:
      - postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    shm_size: "256mb"
    restart: unless-stopped

  roundcubemail:
    image: docker.io/roundcube/roundcubemail:latest-fpm-alpine
    environment:
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_TYPE=pgsql
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_HOST=roundcubedb
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_PORT=5432
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_USER=roundcube
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_PASSWORD=changeme
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_NAME=roundcube
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_SKIN=elastic
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DEFAULT_HOST=ssl://imap.example.com
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DEFAULT_PORT=993
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_SMTP_SERVER=ssl://smtp.example.com
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_SMTP_PORT=465
    depends_on:
      - roundcubedb
    volumes:
      - www:/var/www/html
    restart: unless-stopped

  roundcubenginx:
    image: docker.io/library/nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - 3017:80:web
    depends_on:
      - roundcubemail
    volumes:
      - www:/var/www/html:ro
    configs:
      - source: 'nginx_conf'
        target: '/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf'
    restart: unless-stopped
configs:
  'nginx_conf':
    content: |
      server {
          listen 80;
          server_name _;
          root /var/www/html;
          index index.php;

          location / {
              try_files $uri $uri/ /index.php?$args;
          }

          location ~ \.php$ {
              fastcgi_pass roundcubemail:9000;
              fastcgi_index index.php;
              fastcgi_param SCRIPT_FILENAME $document_root$fastcgi_script_name;
              include fastcgi_params;
          }

          location ~* \.(jpg|jpeg|gif|png|css|js|ico|xml|woff|woff2)$ {
              expires 30d;
              access_log off;
          }
      }

Run this command in routeros terminal to get organization creation link:

description: Zulip is an organized team chat app for distributed teams of all sizes.
name: zulip
yaml:
---
name: zulip
descr: Zulip is an organized team chat app for distributed teams of all sizes.
page: https://zulip.com
category: productivity
default-credentials: |
  Run this command in routeros terminal to get organization creation link:
  /container shell app-zulip-zulip user=zulip workdir=/home/zulip/deployments/current cmd="./manage.py generate_realm_creation_link"
services:
  database:
    image: "docker.io/zulip/zulip-postgresql:14"
    restart: unless-stopped
    secrets:
      - zulip__postgres_password
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: "zulip"
      POSTGRES_USER: "zulip"
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/zulip__postgres_password
    volumes:
      - "postgresql-14:/var/lib/postgresql/data:rw"
    attach: false
  memcached:
    image: "docker.io/memcached:alpine"
    restart: unless-stopped
    command:
      - "sh"
      - "-euc"
      - |
        echo 'mech_list: plain' > "$$SASL_CONF_PATH"
        echo "zulip@$$HOSTNAME:$$(cat $$MEMCACHED_PASSWORD_FILE)" > "$$MEMCACHED_SASL_PWDB"
        echo "zulip@localhost:$$(cat $$MEMCACHED_PASSWORD_FILE)" >> "$$MEMCACHED_SASL_PWDB"
        exec memcached -S
    secrets:
      - zulip__memcached_password
    environment:
      SASL_CONF_PATH: "/home/memcache/memcached.conf"
      MEMCACHED_SASL_PWDB: "/home/memcache/memcached-sasl-db"
      MEMCACHED_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/zulip__memcached_password
    attach: false
  rabbitmq:
    image: "docker.io/rabbitmq:4.2"
    restart: unless-stopped
    command:
      - "sh"
      - "-euc"
      - |
        export RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS="$$(cat $$RABBITMQ_PASSWORD_FILE)"
        echo 'default_user = $$(RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER)' >> /etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf
        echo 'default_pass = $$(RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS)' >> /etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf
        exec docker-entrypoint.sh rabbitmq-server
    secrets:
      - zulip__rabbitmq_password
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: "zulip"
      RABBITMQ_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/zulip__rabbitmq_password
    volumes:
      - "rabbitmq:/var/lib/rabbitmq:rw"
    attach: false
  redis:
    image: "docker.io/redis:alpine"
    restart: unless-stopped
    command:
      - "sh"
      - "-euc"
      - '/usr/local/bin/docker-entrypoint.sh --requirepass "$$(cat $$REDIS_PASSWORD_FILE)"'
    secrets:
      - zulip__redis_password
    environment:
      REDIS_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/zulip__redis_password
    volumes:
      - "redis:/data:rw"
    attach: false
  zulip:
    image: "ghcr.io/zulip/zulip-server:11.5-2"
    restart: unless-stopped
    build:
      context: .
    ports:
      - name: smtp
        target: 25
        published: 25
        app_protocol: smtp
      - name: http
        target: 80
        published: 5010
        app_protocol: http
    secrets:
      - zulip__postgres_password
      - zulip__memcached_password
      - zulip__rabbitmq_password
      - zulip__redis_password
      - zulip__secret_key
      - zulip__email_password
    environment:
      # Default hostnames; configure your application in compose.override.yaml
      SETTING_REMOTE_POSTGRES_HOST: "database"
      SETTING_MEMCACHED_LOCATION: "memcached:11211"
      SETTING_RABBITMQ_HOST: "rabbitmq"
      SETTING_REDIS_HOST: "redis"
      SETTING_EXTERNAL_HOST: "[accessIP]"
      SETTING_ZULIP_ADMINISTRATOR: "admin@example.com"
    volumes:
      - "zulip:/data:rw"
    ulimits:
      nofile:
        soft: 1000000
        hard: 1048576
    depends_on:
      - database
      - memcached
      - rabbitmq
      - redis
    configs:
      - source: 'zulip.conf'
        target: '/etc/zulip/zulip.conf'
volumes:
  zulip:
  postgresql-14:
  rabbitmq:
  redis:
configs:
  'zulip.conf':
    content: |
      [machine]
      puppet_classes = zulip::profile::docker
      deploy_type = production
      
      [postgresql]
      version = 14

      [application_server]
      http_only = true
      nginx_worker_processes = 2
      
      [loadbalancer]
      ips = 0.0.0.0/0
